visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand before a large red and blue Costco Wholesale logo in a brightly lit indoor warehouse. The woman on the left wears a black dress, smiling broadly and waving with her hands raised high. The woman on the right wears a white top and a matching white baseball cap, also waving excitedly toward the camera. The background shows shoppers and metal railings in a spacious, high-ceilinged retail environment. Large text overlays in pink and yellow announce a 'Black Friday' promotion. (2) A rapid montage of various products begins on store shelves. Each segment features a specific item, such as a black JBL Clip 5 speaker, a stack of Levi's t-shirts in grey and white boxes, and sets of blue 32 Degrees thermal wear. The camera is static on the products, which are displayed on warehouse shelves with clear studio-like indoor lighting. Large, bold text overlays dominate the lower half of the screen, listing original and discounted prices in Traditional Chinese. (3) The montage continues with clothing and household items. Boxes of DKNY underwear in black and beige are shown stacked high, followed by white Airmate electric heaters and colorful Berkshire plush blankets. The camera angles are consistent eye-level shots framing the retail displays. Bright, high-saturation colors highlight the product packaging. Text overlays provide clear pricing information, showing subtractions of discounts from original costs for items like sunglasses and skin care sets. (4) Tech and pet supplies are showcased in the final sequence. An Acer computer monitor displays a vibrant waterfall scene, followed by rows of Steelseries gaming mice and various cat food packages from Mon Petit featuring images of white cats. Each shot is a quick close-up or medium shot of the shelf display. The background remains a consistent warehouse aisle with high industrial ceilings and professional lighting. Text overlays continue to detail price points and brand names.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators in the intro.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one has long black hair and wears a dark top, the other wears a white t-shirt and a white baseball cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse store, characterized by high industrial ceilings, heavy-duty shelving units, and organized product displays in a wide-aisle environment.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with high-arousal female voices cheering and speaking rapidly in Mandarin, set against a fast-tempo, upbeat electronic pop track with a strong 4/4 beat. The music is bright with synthesized textures. Small 'pop' sound effects accompany the appearance of text overlays. The vocal pitch is high and energetic. (2) A male narrator takes over with an extremely fast, articulated speech rate. He methodically lists product names and prices with high intensity and a professional yet excited tone. The background music remains constant, maintaining a high-energy pulse that matches the rapid visual cuts of electronics and clothing. There are no significant pauses between words. (3) The male narration continues without interruption, describing clothing and heater prices. His vocal delivery has a rising intonation at the end of phrases to maintain momentum. The BGM tempo is around 130 BPM, providing a driving rhythmic bed. Occasional subtle 'whoosh' sound effects mark the transitions between product categories on screen. (4) The final sequence continues the rapid-fire price listing for tech gadgets, cat food, and kitchenware. The narrator's voice remains dominant and clear with excellent signal-to-noise ratio. The spectral brightness of the track is high, emphasizing the sharp consonants of the speech and the crisp percussion of the background music.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Itemized Product List -> Promotion Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote specific Black Friday deals at Costco Taiwan by rapidly showcasing discounted products and their clear price points to drive consumer interest during the sale period.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of store (Costco), display of logo, and itemized listing of retail price discounts.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy, fast-paced retail promotion utilizing typical social-media editing styles such as rapid cuts, bold text overlays, and high-arousal narration.
